all.title: Wildfire smoke triggers health issues in cattle before serious diseases are visible
all.description: Wildfire smoke has well established detrimental links to human health. It increases respiratory issues, is linked to dementia, and can even be fatal among the most vulnerable groups. But scientists are still working to uncover how wildfire smoke affects other living beings, in both the short and long term. Researchers at Oregon State University took […]

all.title: What could a supercharged El Nino mean for Canada?
all.description: There's growing evidence that a supercharged El Nino will develop over the next few months, spelling possible hot and dry conditions to come for large parts of Canada.
